episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 364: Commander Masters Revealed!
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and dig into all the fresh reveals related to Commander Masters, March of the Machine and the Lord of the Rings Magic set.
